steps.title: Scale the given expression
steps.content: The target expression $9x+6$ is exactly $3$ times the given expression $3x+2$: $$9x+6=3(3x+2).$$

steps.title: Substitute the known value
steps.content: Since $3x+2=8$, multiply by $3$: $$9x+6=3(8)=24.$$ The answer is 24.

steps.title: Avoid extra work
steps.content: Solving for $x$ first also works, but this scaling shortcut goes straight from the given expression to the requested expression.
